author: jtraglia
content: The note there is correct. Why would the deposit be dropped?

author: jtraglia
content: That is only true if you make a 0x03 deposit right now.

author: jtraglia
content: And the pending deposit is processed before the Gloas upgrade.

author: jtraglia
content: The "refund" is via [the builder withdrawal sweep](https://ethspec.tools/#specs/v1.7.0-alpha.8/functions-get_builders_sweep_withdrawals) btw.

author: nc1234
content: Ah right 👍 got confused because here is the only place that the term "refund" is used

author: m.kalinin
